---
title: "TidyTuesday Gallery"
description: "Weekly data figures drawn in Typst with Gribouille."
listing:
  id: gallery
  contents:
    - "tidytuesday/20*/*/*/index.qmd"
  template: assets/listings/gallery.ejs.md
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: [date, title]
  filter-ui: true
  categories: true
  page-size: 12
  feed: true
  fields: [title, date, description, categories, image]
  field-types:
    date: date
page-layout: full
sidebar: false
comments:
  giscus:
    repo: mcanouil/gribouille
    repo-id: R_kgDOSGUuww
    category: Show and tell
    category-id: DIC_kwDOSGUuw84C7KIZ
---

Each week takes a [TidyTuesday](https://github.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday) dataset and turns it into a figure drawn entirely in [Typst](https://typst.app), mostly with [Gribouille](https://m.canouil.dev/gribouille).
Pick a card to see the figure and its source.

::: {#gallery}
:::
